session_expired_message.en: Your session is expired! Please sign-in again.
session_expired_message.nl: Uw sessie is verlopen! Meld u opnieuw aan.

signout_complete.en: You have been successfully signed out. You can close this browser tab or window.
signout_complete.nl: U bent succesvol afgemeld. U kunt dit browsertabblad of -venster sluiten.

no_permissions1.en: You don't have permission to use this resource.
no_permissions1.nl: U heeft geen toestemming om deze bron te gebruiken.

no_permissions2.en: Please contract your administrator for assistance.
